race.comment: BENGAL DIAMOND (2) won a similar race to this at Eagle Farm two back then didn't run a strong mile subsequently. Back to her right trip today and the addition of winkers for the first time might add a bit of spark. NORTH POLE (11) returned from a short spell with an effortless victory over 1200m at the Gold Coast recently. Yet to miss the frame in four runs at 1400m. Looms as a major threat following a few key scratchings. POCKETMONEY (19) dug deep to win on the Gold Coast last start and if able to repeat that level of performance, he must come right into the mix. ECLAIR AWESOME (14) was never in the race last start, but is more than capable and has to be kept safe.
